identity.tagline: Build Smarter. Build Faster. Build with LMN.

layout_strategy.mobile_first: Always start with single column layout for mobile, expand to multi-column for tablet/desktop
layout_strategy.bento_grid: Use for category selection and feature highlights. Mix col-span-1, col-span-2, and row-span-2 for visual interest.

buttons.primary: bg-[#001F3F] text-white hover:bg-[#003366] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider shadow-lg hover:scale-105 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-[#FFD700] text-[#001F3F] hover:bg-[#FFC000] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider shadow-md hover:scale-105 transition-all
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#001F3F] text-[#001F3F] hover:bg-[#001F3F] hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider transition-all

cards.service_card: bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 group
cards.property_card: bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-lg hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 group

sections: Hero: Immersive background, strong value prop, dual CTA (Order Material / View Properties)
Verticals: 3-column bento grid highlighting Infra, Construction, Properties
Trust Indicators: '4-6 Hour Delivery', '300+ Quality Checks', '10 Year Warranty'

materials.layout: Sidebar filter (desktop) / Top filter (mobile) + Product Grid
materials.features: Category tabs (Civil, Electrical, Plumbing, Finishing), 'Add to Quote' functionality, WhatsApp inquiry button per item

sections: Cost Estimator Calculator (Input: Sq.ft -> Output: Est. Cost)
Project Tracker: Mockup of timeline view
Featured Listings: Large image cards with key specs (BHK, Sq.ft, Location)
Project Details: Modal or separate page for Shivantha Gardenia, Evon, Krishna's Arena

contact.layout: Split screen: Contact Form vs Contact Info/Map
contact.features: Direct WhatsApp links for Naveen and Parvez

universal_guidelines: Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings to give a strong, industrial feel.
Use 'Inter' for body text for maximum readability.
Primary Color: Navy Blue (#001F3F) - Use for headers, primary buttons, and footer.
Secondary Color: Gold (#FFD700) - Use for accents, 'Request Quote' buttons, and highlights.
Always include a floating WhatsApp button on all pages.
Ensure all forms have a 'Submit via WhatsApp' option.
Use high-quality images with overlays to ensure text readability.
Mobile-first: Ensure all touch targets are at least 44px.
Use 'Sonner' for all toast notifications (e.g., 'Quote Request Sent').
Do not use generic 'Lorem Ipsum'. Use realistic copy related to construction and real estate.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-conversion marketing site. Focus on speed, trust, and clarity. The 'Request Quote' flow is the most important action. Ensure the 'Cost Estimator' is functional and interactive. Use the provided image URLs for the respective sections. Do not create a backend; mock the data for the catalog and properties.
